reviews.comment:
La verdad hace falta limpieza. No funciona el agua fría..no funciona el wifi .no funciona la puerta del baño .deja mucho que desear ..yo estuve en la habitación n 6

(Translated by Google)
Honestly, it needs cleaning. The cold water doesn't work, the Wi-Fi doesn't work, the bathroom door doesn't work. It leaves a lot to be desired. I stayed in room number 6.

reviews.comment:
Sanitarios muy limpios,  el personal es muy amable. Cuenta con un restaurante pero pedimos comida para llevar (empanadas y sándwiches muy ricos).

(Translated by Google)
Very clean restrooms, the staff is very friendly. They have a restaurant but we ordered takeout (delicious empanadas and sandwiches).

reviews.comment:
Impecables las habitaciones. Amplias, cómodas, con todo lo necesario  . El baño amplio, con suficiente espacio, la ducha excelente. Muy atento el personal. El restaurante tambien. La ubicacion si venis viajando es excelente Super recomendado . Con el plus que admiten mascotas

(Translated by Google)
The rooms were spotless. Spacious, comfortable, and had everything you could need. The bathroom was large and had plenty of space, and the shower was excellent. The staff was very attentive, as was the restaurant. The location is excellent if you're traveling. Highly recommended. Plus, they allow pets.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/235504011442524275/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNLLUlyUzZnRRAB
